name: Raspberry Ribbon Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups Fresh or frozen unsweetened Raspberries (Thawed)
1 1/2 cups Fresh or frozen unsweetened Raspberries (Thawed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first three ingredients; press into bottom and 1 1/2 in. up the sides of a greased 9-in. springform pan. Chill 1 hour or until firm.
2. Puree raspberries in a blender or food processor. Press through a sieve; discard seeds. Add water if necessary to measure 1 cup.
3. In a saucepan, combine sugar and cornstarch. Stir in raspberry juice; bring to a boil. Boil 2 minutes, stirring constantly. Remove from heat; stir in lemon juice and set aside.
4. In a mixing bowl, beat cream cheese, sugar, flour, and vanilla until fluffy. Add egg whites; beat on low just until blended.
5. Stir in cream. Pour half into crust. Top with 3/4 cup raspberry sauce (cover and refrigerate remaining sauce).
6. Carefully spoon remaining filling over sauce. Bake at 375°F for 35-40 minutes or until center is nearly set.
7. Remove from oven; immediately run a knife around pan to loosen crust. Cool on wire rack 1 hour.
8. Refrigerate overnight. Add orange juice to chilled raspberry sauce; gently fold in raspberries. Spoon over cheesecake.
